'''Stanfeld Duffit''' was the [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Mayor/Legends|mayor]] of [[Montrol City]], the [[Capital/Legends|capital]] of [[Gandle Ott]] in the [[Kathol sector/Legends|Kathol sector]] of the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]]. In [[8 ABY/Legends|8 ABY]], [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Warlord/Legends|warlord]] [[Moff/Legends|Moff]] [[Kentor Sarne]]'s [[Battle of Kal'Shebbol|defeat]] at [[Kal'Shebbol/Legends|Kal'Shebbol]] by the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] led him to retreat to Gandle Ott.

After stripping the planet of its [[Gandle Ott system defense force|defense force]] and [[Unidentified Imperial Governor (Gandle Ott)|governor]], the Moff departed and left the planet in confusion. The New Republic [[CR90 corvette/Legends|CR90 corvette]] ''[[FarStar]]'' arrived [[Standard day/Legends|days]] later, and began opening [[Diplomat/Legends|diplomatic]] relations with the planet. During the course of the four-day visit, Duffit extended several courtesies to the ''FarStar'' delegation in the hopes that associating himself with the New Republic would be beneficial to his [[City/Legends|city]].

==Biography==
Stanfeld Duffit was a [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|male]] who lived on [[Gandle Ott]] in the [[Kathol sector/Legends|Kathol sector]] of the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]].<ref name="dirp" /> By [[8 ABY/Legends|8 ABY]],<ref name="date">The events of ''[[The DarkStryder Campaign]]'' are set four [[Standard year/Legends|years]] after the [[Battle of Endor/Legends|Battle of Endor]], which equates to [[4 ABY/Legends|4 ABY]] per ''[[The New Essential Chronology]]''.</ref> he served as the [[Mayor/Legends|mayor]] of the [[Planet/Legends|planet's]] [[Capital/Legends|capital]], [[Montrol City]], and maintained an [[Duffit's Estate|estate]] in the Residential District. Duffit was proud of his [[City/Legends|city]], which was considered impressive for such a remote planet, and of [[CUTH-BRT-92-X3]], the [[BRT supercomputer/Legends|BRT supercomputer]] that helped to run Montrol City's automated systems.<ref name="dirp" />

In 8 [[Galactic Standard Calendar|ABY]],<ref name="date" /> the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Warlord/Legends|warlord]] who controlled the [[Sector/Legends|sector]], [[Moff/Legends|Moff]] [[Kentor Sarne]], was [[Battle of Kal'Shebbol|forced]] from his capital on [[Kal'Shebbol/Legends|Kal'Shebbol]] by the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]]. Sarne retreated to Gandle Ott, where he stripped the [[Ott system|system]] of its [[Gandle Ott system defense force|defense force]] and [[Unidentified Imperial Governor (Gandle Ott)|governor]] before departing. With Gandle Ott thrown into confusion, two figures emerged as rivals for control of the planet: [[Marja Lang]], the [[Lieutenant governor/Legends|Vice-Governor]] who had been left behind by Sarne, and [[General/Legends|General]] [[Herron Dade]], [[Commander/Legends|commander]] of the [[Gandle Ott planetary militia|planetary militia]]. Several [[Standard day/Legends|days]] later, the New Republic [[CR90 corvette/Legends|CR90 corvette]] ''[[FarStar]]'' arrived [[DarkStryder Campaign|pursuing]] Sarne. Duffit was part of a governmental delegation that met the command crew of the ''FarStar'' at [[Montrol Spaceport]].<ref name="dirp" />

On the second day of the ''FarStar''{{'s}} visit, Duffit conducted them on a tour of Montrol City, showing them the sights and locations he felt would appeal to representatives of the New Republic, including the former [[Jedi chapter house (Gandle Ott)|Jedi chapter house]], the art museums, industrial locations, courts and the [[Montrol City Computer Center|Computer Center]], where he introduced them to CUTH-BRT-92-X3. On the third day, he hosted a dinner party at his estate, inviting both the New Republic officials as well as several hundred business leaders and supporters of General Dade. Duffit hoped to attract new business to Gandle Ott, and knew that he would benefit from any association with the New Republic regardless of who ascended to the leadership of the planet. After several days visiting the planet and establishing [[Diplomat/Legends|diplomatic]] ties, the ''FarStar'' left Gandle Ott to continue its pursuit of Moff Sarne.<ref name="dirp" />

==Personality and traits==
Stanfeld Duffit had [[Color/Legends|black]] receding hair and a mustache. As mayor of Montrol City, he was immensely proud of his city, and took every opportunity he could to show it off and to attract new commerce. He had enough [[Politics/Legends|political]] experience to realize that an association with the New Republic would be beneficial both for himself and Montrol City, regardless of who won control of the planet between Herron Dade and Marja Lang.<ref name="dirp" />

==Behind the scenes==
Stanfeld Duffit appeared in ''[[Death Is Remotely Possible]]'', the third [[roleplaying game]] adventure in ''[[The DarkStryder Campaign]]'', which was published by [[West End Games]] for use with ''[[Star Wars: The Roleplaying Game]]'' in [[1995]].<ref name="dirp" />
